hero.alt: Traveler in transport, illustration of collaborative shipping with Yamba

savings.title: More affordable
savings.text: Lower the cost of sending small parcels by using trips that are already planned.

trust.title: More transparent
trust.text: Clear parcel tracking, easier communication, and direct contact with the traveler.

impact.title: More responsible
impact.text: Yamba optimizes existing trips to reduce unnecessary dedicated transport.
